rules: No generic sans-serif for headings. Georgia must be used aggressively with tight tracking (tracking-tighter) for a premium print-magazine feel.
Large numbers (01, 02) used for editorial structure, acting as graphic elements rather than just text.
Body text uses default serif to contrast the massive headings.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Mode A: The Tetris Grid (Asymmetric Bento)
rules: Use a 12-column grid. Feature 1 spans 8 cols (hero size), Feature 2 spans 4 cols (tall portrait), Feature 3 spans 5 cols (square), Feature 4 spans 7 cols (wide).
Massive internal padding (p-10 to p-14) on cards to let content breathe.
Cards have rounded-[2rem] corners to look intentional and distinct from standard 8px SaaS corners.

hover_states: Borders transition from white/5 to #00D4C8/30 on group hover.
Background decorative elements (large icons, grid patterns) increase in opacity and scale gently (duration-700) on hover.

feature_card.details: Icon sits in a perfectly round glass-like badge. Large numerals sit opposite the icon. Title and description sit at the bottom, left-aligned.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over deep navy meets WCAG AA standards. Use white/60 for secondary text to maintain legibility against #131936.

media.notes: Relies entirely on Lucide React icons scaled up massively for background texture, avoiding the need for generic vector illustrations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the provided Asymmetric Bento layout. Ensure 'font-heading' maps correctly to the existing Georgia configuration in Tailwind. Do not revert to symmetrical grids. Keep the massive padding and typography scales intact.
